assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder chain
assertions.rationale: Code shows `.AddServerSideSessions()` chained on the IdentityServer builder.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures AddOperationalStore with UseSqlServer using the connection string from configuration
assertions.rationale: Code shows `.AddOperationalStore(options => { options.ConfigureDbContext = b => b.UseSqlServer(connectionString, ...); });` where connectionString comes from configuration.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs does not rely on the default in-memory session store for production use
assertions.rationale: The code uses AddOperationalStore with SQL Server, replacing the in-memory default.
